title: Love This Right Now
excerpt: Work or play? Who cares, it's fun and I love all the projects we have going on. Right now, on my desk is a bunch of goodness from Kelly Purkey (sorry this kit is sold out - but she has…
body: Work or play? Who cares, it's fun and I love all the projects we have going on. Right now, on my desk is a bunch of goodness from Kelly Purkey (sorry this kit is sold out - but she has more coming out soon) and Jen Hadfield's debut collection with Pebbles, Home + Made. Also - if you are in Southern California, I would love to have you come and "play" with me at Studio Crescendoh on October 18! Last time we had a blast and the class sold out fast. Get more info on this awesome art journaling workshop using the newest collection, Stitched and sign up for the class here.
